name: Death in the Dorms
overview: These are the stories of the kind of danger that no college student is ever prepared for: a life cut short just when it was getting started, not by accident but by foul play. Each procedural episode of “Death in the Dorms” will examine a different murder of a college student in the U.S.

trailers.title: ‘Death in the Dorms’ – Streaming January 5, only on Hulu.
